# Pay-on-success pilot

## When to use

Use for high-trust B2B where value is measurable.

## Why it works

Transfers risk from buyer to seller.

## Mechanism

Powerful when unit economics can absorb risk.

## Required inputs

Pilot contract, success metric, baseline.

## When not to use

If outcome not controllable.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Pilot acceptance, success rate, expansion.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
